markdown_content:
## Executive Summary

User uploaded comprehensive specifications for KNOWN - Civilisation 3.0 web app and requested full implementation. Manus analyzed the requirements, selected a 'Biophilic Futurism' design approach, and successfully built a complete interactive website with mindmap visualization, scrollable sections, and custom visual assets. The project represents a vision for future civilization combining humanity, AI, and environmental harmony.


## Context & Intent

Transform detailed text specifications into a fully functional, visually compelling web application for the KNOWN - Civilisation 3.0 project


## What Was Done

Analyzed uploaded specifications, brainstormed design concepts, selected Biophilic Futurism approach, implemented full-stack web app with React/TypeScript/TailwindCSS, created interactive mindmap with 6 branches, built scrollable one-page experience with 7 sections, designed custom visual assets and typography system


## Outputs Produced

- [web_application] KNOWN - Civilisation 3.0 Website — Complete interactive website with mindmap, scrollable sections, and biophilic design
- [design_system] Biophilic Futurism Design Direction — Comprehensive visual design system with color philosophy and typography
- [code_implementation] React/TypeScript Codebase — Full frontend implementation with D3-like visualization and responsive design

## Key Decisions & Validations

- Selected Biophilic Futurism over other design concepts
- Used React, TypeScript, and TailwindCSS tech stack
- Implemented custom D3-like mindmap visualization
- Chose Space Grotesk and Manrope typography system
- Applied organic glassmorphism with bioluminescent color accents

## Lessons Learned

Worked well:

- Design concept selection process
- Interactive mindmap implementation
- Comprehensive visual asset creation
- Responsive design execution
Discoveries:

- Biophilic Futurism effectively represents the humanity-AI-nature synthesis
- Custom D3-like visualization provides better control than standard libraries

## Open Questions

- User response to empty message at end unclear
- Backend integration requirements not specified
- Content management preferences unknown

## Next Steps

- Connect contact form and newsletter to backend service
- Implement CMS or JSON-based content management
- Create enhanced mobile mindmap experience
- Await user feedback on delivered implementation
